title: Pack Manifest
subtitle: pack.json + assets.jsonl
description: Preferred editable canonical format for reviewed asset packs. Stores pack metadata in pack.json and one asset record per line in assets.jsonl; generated SQLite indexes consume it for fast search.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Pack Manifest contract: layout, pack.json fields, assets.jsonl rows, path boundary, and current Asset Index integration.

children.title: manifest.mjs
children.description: Reads packs/<pack-id>/pack.json and assets.jsonl into normalized asset records and pack summaries for Asset Index.

children.title: integrity.mjs
children.description: Repository-wide tracked-binary integrity core for inventory coverage, owner-local metadata, license/provenance/origin, SHA, path and duplicate validation.

children.title: tracked_binary_inventory.json
children.description: Machine inventory classifying every tracked binary blob and external gitlink boundary and routing owner-local metadata sources.

children.title: PROJECT_OUTPUT_LICENSE.md
children.description: Owner-local public-use license evidence for the canonical generated HDR and fast hook recorder outputs identified by their manifest SHA-256 values.
children.role: AI Studio generated output license evidence

children.title: integrity.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies issue codes, Windows paths, scoped IDs, fail-closed git setup, compact scope output, and complete real-repository inventory coverage.
